assertions.reason: Admin-only hardening surfaces still could not be exercised because the real browser surface exposes no way to obtain admin claims; direct /settings navigation rendered access denied.
Domain allowlist management remains unreachable from browser-only validation because the settings surface still requires admin claims that self-service signup does not provide.
The admin diagnostics surface never rendered; direct navigation still showed access denied for the admin-themed self-service account.
Audit-event recording is still not user-visible without the admin diagnostics surface, which remained inaccessible from the browser.
Audit-trail filter controls live on the admin diagnostics surface, which still could not be reached from any browser-visible admin session.
Standardized infra error codes are presented on the admin diagnostics page, but that surface remained unreachable without real admin claims.
Lifecycle metrics are still presented only on the admin diagnostics page, and the browser surface never produced an admin-capable session to load that page.

blockers.description: Admin-only settings and diagnostics surfaces remain inaccessible from self-service browser accounts.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried direct /settings and /admin/diagnostics navigation with a fresh admin-themed signup, but both stayed on access-denied states.

summary: All settings/diagnostics assertions remain blocked because browser-only self-service flows still cannot open admin surfaces.
